headline: 44 contracts catalogued across Ethereum and Base (with same-address deployments on 30+ additional chains); 5 governance/admin addresses and 39 protocol contracts identified from official docs, Etherscan name tags, and Foundry broadcast logs.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search surfaced: Morpho core (0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37EEFFCb), ETH Bundler (0xa7995f71aa11525DB02Fc2473c37Dee5dbf55107), Rewards Multisig (0xF057afeEc22E220f47AD4220871364e9E828b2e9), Rewards Manager Proxy (0x78681e63b6f3ad81ecD64AECC404d765b529C80d), Rewards Emission Data (0xf27fa85b6748c8a64d4b0d3d6083eb26f18bde8e), Market Rewards Program Registry (0x5148bF15bb722E1854F66430Bc9FeD0E9FDaCE7D), Public Allocator (0xfd32fA2ca22c76dD6E550706Ad913FC6CE91c75D), MORPHO token (0x58D97B57BB95320F9a05dC918Aef65434969c2B2), Legacy MORPHO (0x9994E35Db50125E0DF82e4c2dde62496CE330999). Direct block-explorer fetches were blocked; addresses recovered via search grounding.

Official addresses page at https://docs.morpho.org/get-started/resources/addresses fetched; lists all Ethereum contracts: Morpho Blue core, Adaptive Curve IRM, ChainlinkOracleV2Factory, PreLiquidation Factory, MetaMorpho factories V1.1 and OLD, Public Allocator, VaultV2Factory and adapters, Bundler3 and legacy bundlers, URD Factory, MORPHO token contracts, and more. Multi-chain deployments listed in tabs but only Ethereum tab rendered in fetch. Set as deployed_contracts_doc.

Audit page at https://docs.morpho.org/get-started/resources/audits/ fetched; lists 23 audits from Spearbit, OpenZeppelin, Certora, Cantina, ABDK, Zellic, ChainSecurity, Blackthorn, Omniscia, Lexfo, Securing. Scope includes Morpho V1 (core), MetaMorpho V1 (periphery), Vault V2, MORPHO Token. No addresses listed in audit scope table beyond links to GitHub audit folders.

GitHub repo https://github.com/morpho-org/morpho-blue-deployment fetched (archived Jan 22, 2025). Foundry broadcast log broadcast/DeployMorpho.sol/1/run-latest.json fetched at commit e90bb45: confirms Morpho deployed via CREATE2 at 0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37EEFFCb by deployer 0x937ce2d6c488b361825d2db5e8a70e26d48afed5, IRM at 0xD2349531F5b9b68bbB095b18C33a5CeBd60452c8, and initial owner set to 0x6ABfd6139c7C3CC270ee2Ce132E309F59cAaF6a2.

Protocol deployed on 30+ chains per docs; the same CREATE2 address 0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37EEFFCb is used for Morpho core across all chains. Docs show chain-specific tabs for Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, etc., but full per-chain content was not retrieved in this run due to JavaScript tab rendering. Base Rewards Multisig at 0x5Eb982bb1E620cC3927E5CF8A5D207e667643297 was recovered from the governance org page. Bundler3 and other periphery contracts also use the same address across chains. Chains with zero per-chain address detail noted in unknowns.

Factory addresses surfaced: MetaMorpho Factory V1.1 (0x1897A8997241C1cD4bD0698647e4EB7213535c24), MetaMorpho Factory OLD (0xA9c3D3a366466Fa809d1Ae982Fb2c46E5fC41101), VaultV2Factory (0xA1D94F746dEfa1928926b84fB2596c06926C0405), MorphoVaultV1AdapterFactory (0xD1B8E2dee25c2b89DCD2f98448a7ce87d6F63394), MorphoMarketV1AdapterV2Factory (0x32BB1c0D48D8b1B3363e86eeB9A0300BAd61ccc1), URD Factory (0x9baA51245CDD28D8D74Afe8B3959b616E9ee7c8D), ChainlinkOracleV2Factory (0x3A7bB36Ee3f3eE32A60e9f2b33c1e5f2E83ad766), PreLiquidation Factory (0x6FF33615e792E35ed1026ea7cACCf42D9BF83476). Child enumeration (thousands of markets/vaults) not performed; capped per D6 rule.

Role taxonomy applied: Morpho core = other (singleton lending protocol); IRM = other; Factories = factory; Bundlers = router; MORPHO token = token; DAO multisig = multisig (owner of Morpho Blue); Rewards Multisig = multisig (rewards); URD = other (rewards distributor); Rewards Manager Proxy = other. Actor class of 0x6ABfd6139c7C3CC270ee2Ce132E309F59cAaF6a2 (initial owner at deployment time) unverified as multisig or EOA in this run — noted in unknowns.

All 44 entries in admin_addresses trace to fetched URLs: docs addresses page (D2 fetch), Etherscan search results (D1), Foundry broadcast log (D4), and governance org page (D5 fetch). Address_book item 0xcBa28b381748926701ed11F1702b210C04965C44 ('Morpho DAO Executor') is distinct from the governance multisig 0xcBa28b38103307Ec8dA98377ffF9816C164f9AFa; both recorded.

rationale.verdict: Discovery run walked 4 corpora: official docs addresses page (D2), Etherscan name-tag search results (D1), Foundry broadcast logs from GitHub deployment repo (D4), and governance docs page (D5). 44 contract addresses catalogued across Ethereum (primary) with same-address deployments across 30+ chains. 5 admin/governance and 39 protocol addresses identified.

evidence.shows: Official deployed contracts page listing all Ethereum Morpho Blue, MetaMorpho, Vault V2, Bundler, Rewards, and MORPHO Token addresses

Morpho DAO 5/9 governance multisig address 0xcBa28b38103307Ec8dA98377ffF9816C164f9AFa on Ethereum and Base; Rewards Multisig addresses; governance powers limited to fee switch, LLTV/IRM whitelisting, treasury

Full audit list: 23 audits by Spearbit, OpenZeppelin, Certora, Cantina, ABDK, Zellic, ChainSecurity, Blackthorn, Omniscia, Lexfo, Securing; scope includes Morpho Blue V1 (2023-10), MetaMorpho (2023-11), Vault V2 (2025)
Archived Foundry deployment repo for Morpho Blue; contains broadcast logs; archived Jan 22 2025

Ethereum mainnet deployment: Morpho core CREATE2 deployed to 0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37EEFFCb, initial IRM 0xD2349531F5b9b68bbB095b18C33a5CeBd60452c8, owner set to 0x6ABfd6139c7C3CC270ee2Ce132E309F59cAaF6a2; deployer was 0x937ce2d6c488b361825d2db5e8a70e26d48afed5
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Morpho' for core singleton lending contract; contract source Morpho.sol with owner/feeRecipient storage slots
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: ETH Bundler' for EthereumBundler contract
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Rewards Multisig' — Gnosis Safe proxy; 3/5 multisig per governance docs
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Rewards Manager Proxy'; TransparentUpgradeableProxy with implementation RewardsManager at 0x581c3816589ad0de7f9c76bc242c97fe96c9f100
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Rewards Emission Data'; EmissionDataProvider contract
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Market Rewards Program Registry'; MarketRewardsProgramRegistry contract
Etherscan name tag 'Morpho: Public Allocator'; PublicAllocator contract for MetaMorpho vaults
MORPHO token ERC-20, EIP-1967 Transparent Proxy with implementation MorphoTokenEthereum at 0x4364fd2371b6318159366abfa51f190df5c24852
Legacy MORPHO token; constructor owner argument 0x6ABfd6139c7C3CC270ee2Ce132E309F59cAaF6a2 confirming that address is DAO governance multisig used at deployment
MorphoChainlinkOracleV2Factory Ethereum address confirmed as 0x3A7bB36Ee3f3eE32A60e9f2b33c1e5f2E83ad766; WstEthStEthExchangeRateChainlinkAdapter at 0x905b7dAbCD3Ce6B792D874e303D336424Cdb1421

unknowns: D1: Direct Etherscan/Basescan/Arbiscan block-explorer fetches blocked in this run; addresses recovered via search grounding only — on-chain read of live state not performed

D5: Per-chain address content for Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Linea, Scroll, Avalanche, and 25+ other chains not retrieved; JavaScript tab-rendered content not accessible from plain-text fetch of addresses page
D5: chain Hyperliquid L1: zero addresses surfaced from fetched sources (non-EVM-standard chain, address not in docs plain-text)

D5: chain Katana, Monad, Flare, Sei, Plume Mainnet, Stable, Etherlink, Hemi, Abstract, Celo, Citrea, TAC, Lisk, Soneium, Corn, Fraxtal, Sonic, Botanix, Ink, Zircuit, xDai, Tempo, Bitlayer, Binance: per-chain tab content not rendered in plain-text fetch; likely same-address deployments as Ethereum but unverified this run
D7: Actor class of 0x6ABfd6139c7C3CC270ee2Ce132E309F59cAaF6a2 (owner set at Morpho Blue deployment) not confirmed on-chain in this run — docs identify it as DAO governance but current state not read

D8: Address_book item 0xcBa28b381748926701ed11F1702b210C04965C44 (labelled 'Morpho DAO Executor') is distinct from governance multisig 0xcBa28b38103307Ec8dA98377ffF9816C164f9AFa per governance docs; role of DAO Executor address not verified on-chain this run
D6: Factory children (MetaMorpho vaults, URD instances, oracle instances) not enumerated — thousands of vaults/markets exist; only factories recorded

admin_addresses.role: owner (Morpho Blue initial owner at deployment; current owner unverified)

protocol_metadata.about: Morpho Blue is a noncustodial lending protocol on the EVM that enables permissionless creation of isolated lending markets with any pair of assets, oracle, and interest rate model. Users can supply assets to earn interest or borrow against collateral by interacting with the singleton Morpho contract; no governance permission is required to create a market. MetaMorpho vaults (V1) and Vault V2 sit on top of Morpho Blue, allowing curators to allocate liquidity across multiple markets and offer an ERC-4626-compliant interface for depositors. The MORPHO governance token enables token-holder voting, with approved actions executed by a 5/9 multisig; governance powers are intentionally limited to fee switches, LLTV/IRM whitelisting, and treasury management.
